query:
INSERT INTO edit_request_wiki_model (
            id,
            wiki_owner_id,
            request_user_id,
            request_wiki_id,
            edit_request_title,
            edit_request_body,
            create_at,
            status
        )
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8)
        RETURNING id
